title: Challenge Issuance Request
description: Request to issue an authentication challenge to an agent

requesting_verifier_id.description: ID of the verifier agent requesting the challenge

target_agent_id.description: ID of the target agent to be challenged

target_instance_id.description: ID of the target instance to be challenged

required_risk_level.description: Required risk level for this authentication

session_pubkey.description: Ephemeral session public key for this authentication

nonce_ttl_seconds.description: Time-to-live for the nonce in seconds
